name: Bassel Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Bassel Courts in Alcoa, TN! There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The courts are free.

name: Boys & Girls Club
description: Come play pickleball at Boys & Girls Club in Maryville, TN! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Everett Recreation Center
description: Everett Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Maryville, TN. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: First Baptist Church of Maryville
description: First Baptist Church of Maryville is a place to play pickleball in Maryville, TN. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: John Sevier Park
description: John Sevier Park is a place to play pickleball in Maryville, TN. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Pickleville Tennessee
description:
10 cushioned courts with extra spacing btwn courts
8 full courts/2 half dink/practice/warm-up courts
8 outdoor courts
2 hour play 
Large indoor rooftop players lounge with perfect views of all indoor courts
Temperature controlled-both heat & air conditioned
Uses Court Reserve App to schedule play
fees: Members only — Both single & family memberships
